description: Use this API to run switching study network solutions. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = tysl(opt)

opt.description: use present voltage vector as starting point.

error_codes.description: error reading the admittance matrix temporary file; one of the following occurred: Admittance matrix temporary file is not open; Reading matrix pointers: different sizes specified than were used in writing them; Reading matrix terms: different sizes specified than were used in writing them.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
